## CoreCLIHelper.sendAnalytics() method

SendAnalytics sends a telemetry event to the Stripe CLI host. The host will forward the event to Stripe's analytics service.

**Signature:**

```typescript
sendAnalytics(eventName: string, eventValue: string): Promise<void>;
```
